name: Lifestealer
description: Oh Master, behold all these lives for the taking! N'aix, the Lifestealer If the infested unit is an enemy creep or a neutral creep, Lifestealer takes control of the unit's ability to move and attack. The infested creep is now consumed from the inside, and loses a portion of its max health per second. Can be cast on ancient creeps.

abilities.name: Ghoul Frenzy
abilities.description: Distant memories of the Vile Council fuel one mind to plotting and the other to more immediate dark ends.

abilities.name: Rage
abilities.description: Grants bonus movement speed, bonus magic resistance, and debuff immunity for the entire duration.

abilities.name: Open Wounds
abilities.description: Rends the unit-targeted enemy, slowing the its movement speed and allowing all allied units to regain health for a percentage of the damage dealt to debuff-affected unit. Lifesteals from all damage instances dealt, including spell damage. Grants all attacking units bonus attack speed on the Open Wounds-affected enemy unit.

abilities.name: Feast
abilities.description: Deals damage and lifesteals for a percentage of the target's max health. Grants a lesser max health bonus stack per enemy creep killed.

abilities.name: Infest
abilities.description: Enables casting Infest on enemy heroes. However, the affected enemy is not granted any of the ability bonuses. Increases cast range, the health regeneration rate, and reduces cooldown. applies a visual indicator above the targeted unit.
